evidence_notes: Judged the BOYSUP repair batch against row metadata, semantic briefs, S-57/S-52 names/attributes, Chart No.1 super-buoy crop, OpenCPN S-52 references, S-101 references when provided by the batch, and repaired Helm renders.
Chart No.1 parity rows include chart1_crop:<chart1_crop_id> tokens when the batch provided crop ids, plus OpenCPN, S-101, helm_candidate, and helm_repaired_render evidence.
Each verdict includes opencpn_render:<asset>:<path>, helm_candidate:<asset>:<path>, and helm_repaired_render:<asset>:<path> evidence.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only; this artifact grants zero final approvals.
